created.description: The timestamp of the card's creation.

updated.description: The timestamp of the card's last update.

public_uuid.description: The public UUID of the card.

type.description: The type of the card. Can be MAESTRO, MASTERCARD.

second_line.description: The second line of text on the card

user_id.description: ID of the user who is owner of the card.

status.description: The status to set for the card. Can be ACTIVE, DEACTIVATED, LOST, STOLEN, CANCELLED, EXPIRED or PIN_TRIES_EXCEEDED.

sub_status.description: The sub-status of the card. Can be NONE or REPLACED.

order_status.description: The order status of the card. Can be NEW_CARD_REQUEST_RECEIVED, CARD_REQUEST_PENDING, SENT_FOR_PRODUCTION, ACCEPTED_FOR_PRODUCTION, DELIVERED_TO_CUSTOMER, CARD_UPDATE_REQUESTED, CARD_UPDATE_PENDING, CARD_UPDATE_SENT, CARD_UPDATE_ACCEPTED, VIRTUAL_DELIVERY, NEW_CARD_REQUEST_PENDING_USER_APPROVAL, SENT_FOR_DELIVERY or NEW_CARD_REQUEST_CANCELLED.

name_on_card.description: The user's name on the card.

preferred_name_on_card.description: The user's preferred name on the card.

primary_account_numbers.description: Array of PANs and their attributes.

payment_account_reference.description: The payment account reference number associated with the card.

card_limit.description: The spending limit for the card.

card_limit_atm.description: The ATM spending limit for the card.

country_permission.description: The countries for which to grant (temporary) permissions to use the card.

label_monetary_account_ordered.description: The monetary account this card was ordered on and the label user that owns the card.

label_monetary_account_current.description: The monetary account that this card is currently linked to and the label user viewing it.

monetary_account.description: Current monetary account (only for prepaid credit cards).

pin_code_assignment.description: Array of Types, PINs, account IDs assigned to the card.

monetary_account_id_fallback.description: ID of the MA to be used as fallback for this card if insufficient balance. Fallback account is removed if not supplied.

country.description: The country that is domestic to the card. Defaults to country of residence of user.

card_shipment_tracking_url.description: A tracking link provided by our shipment provider.

is_eligible_for_free_replacement.description: Whether this card is eligible for a free replacement.

card_replacement.description: The card replacement for this card.
